creator: llevier@argosnet.com
text:
At 00:26 03/06/2008, Felippe de Meirelles Motta wrote:
>Hi Submitter,
Hola Felipe,

>What you think about changing 'www' category to 'security' instead ? It
>seems more appropriate to this port.
In fact, I put it in the same as Squid itself, since it is a Squid enhancement.
But I got no problem having it into Security at the end...

Brgrds

Laurent LEVIER
Systems & Networks Senior Security Expert, CISSP CISM
